stable_facts: Elon Musk is the CEO of Tesla
Tesla is headquartered in Austin Texas
Tesla trades on NASDAQ under ticker TSLA
Tesla manufactures electric vehicles and energy storage products
expected_patterns: mentions Tesla revenue or delivery figure for recent period
mentions autonomous driving Robotaxi or Full Self-Driving
mentions Elon Musk divided attention political activities or other ventures as risk
mentions competition in electric vehicle market from Chinese manufacturers or legacy automakers
mentions energy storage or non-vehicle revenue as growth area
references SEC filing or major financial outlet as source
forbidden_content: Elon Musk has stepped down or resigned from Tesla
Tesla had its best revenue year ever in 2025
notes: Revenue declined for first time in 2025. xAI investment by Tesla is a governance concern. Musk political activities are a documented reputational risk. Robotaxi launch in Bay Area is a genuine positive. High sentiment variance — Skeptic calibration is key test here.
